description: Excavator swing came within 3 ft of ground worker who entered exclusion zone without authorization
root_cause: Ground worker bypassed barricades; spotter was on break
corrective_action: Retrained crew on exclusion zones; added second spotter; installed swing radius alarm

description: Dozer rolled onto side while grading a 40% slope after rain; operator wore seatbelt and was uninjured
root_cause: Slope exceeded safe operating angle; wet soil reduced traction
corrective_action: Implemented mandatory slope measurement before grading; restricted operation after rainfall

description: Rock fell from haul truck bed onto ground worker standing near tailgate during loading
root_cause: Worker positioned in drop zone; no exclusion zone enforced at load point
corrective_action: Established 50-ft exclusion zone during loading; installed load-area cameras

description: Mirror on grader struck by passing semi-truck that entered work zone; operator uninjured
root_cause: Inadequate traffic control setup; no barrier between lane and equipment
corrective_action: Added concrete barriers to TCP; repositioned arrow board; filed DOT complaint

description: Boom contacted 13.8 kV distribution line during trench excavation; no injuries due to proper grounding
root_cause: Utility locate was 3 days old and line had been rerouted; no spotter assigned
corrective_action: Mandatory same-day utility verify; assigned dedicated spotter for overhead hazards

description: Excavator tracked over area where worker had been standing moments before; worker moved just in time
root_cause: Proximity detection system was disabled for maintenance and not reactivated
corrective_action: Implemented lockout procedure requiring supervisor sign-off to disable PDS

description: Loader bucket dropped partial load on haul truck cab during loading; cracked windshield
root_cause: Worn bucket pin allowed excessive play causing spillage
corrective_action: Added bucket pin inspection to daily pre-op checklist; replaced worn pins fleet-wide

description: Noise monitoring revealed compactor operator exposed to 93 dBA over 10-hr shift
root_cause: Cab door seal deteriorated; operator kept window open due to broken A/C
corrective_action: Repaired A/C and door seal; issued dual hearing protection; reduced shift to 8 hrs

description: Excavator swung into parked pickup truck that was inside exclusion zone
root_cause: Vehicle parked in exclusion zone overnight; not spotted during morning walk-around
corrective_action: Implemented dawn perimeter sweep; added physical barriers with reflective markers

description: Three workers reported coughing and eye irritation from silica dust during rock drilling
root_cause: Dust collector filter was clogged; water injection pump had failed the previous day
corrective_action: Replaced dust collector; repaired water pump; implemented daily dust monitoring

description: Articulated truck rolled onto side on haul road curve; operator sustained minor bruise
root_cause: Berm had eroded from rain; speed was excessive for curve radius
corrective_action: Rebuilt berms to 150% tire height; posted speed limits; installed curve warning signs

description: Worker's foot caught between track and concrete wall while guiding excavator; boot crushed
root_cause: Inadequate clearance assessment; worker was directing from too close
corrective_action: Minimum 15-ft clearance rule enforced; installed wireless communication for spotters

description: Hydraulic line burst on loader spraying 3000-psi fluid; operator shut down within 10 seconds
root_cause: Hose exceeded service life; no replacement schedule in place
corrective_action: Implemented hose replacement schedule per Cat SIS recommendations; added hose guards

description: Operator reported headache after 6-hr shift grading dry fill without dust suppression
root_cause: Water truck was assigned to another area; no backup dust control available
corrective_action: Required dedicated water truck per active grading zone; added air quality monitors

description: Hydraulic oil ignited on hot exhaust manifold after hose fitting failure; fire suppression activated
root_cause: Loose fitting from recent maintenance; post-service inspection not completed
corrective_action: Implemented mandatory post-maintenance leak check at operating temperature

description: Motor grader slid into ditch while grading shoulder; operator stayed belted in cab
root_cause: Soft shoulder gave way under rear tandems; no soil assessment done
corrective_action: Required geotechnical assessment for shoulder work; reduced operating speed near edges

description: Small concrete chunk fell from bridge deck onto excavator cab during demolition below
root_cause: Demolition sequencing error; material fell before containment installed
corrective_action: Revised demolition plan to install catch platforms first; added cab protection screen

description: Haul truck backed over edge of dump point berm; rear wheels went over edge
root_cause: Berm was inadequate height; no spotter at dump point; night shift with poor lighting
corrective_action: Rebuilt berms; required spotter at all dump points; installed additional lighting

description: Rock fragment ejected during drilling struck worker 80 ft away; hard hat deflected impact
root_cause: Fractured rock formation not identified; exclusion zone was only 50 ft
corrective_action: Expanded exclusion zone to 150 ft; required geologic survey before drilling

description: Loader tipped forward into excavation when edge collapsed under front tires
root_cause: Edge of excavation not barricaded; loader approached too close
corrective_action: Installed barriers 6 ft from excavation edge; assigned spotter for work near excavations

description: Operator reported lower back pain after 3 consecutive days of vibratory compaction
root_cause: Seat suspension worn out; no rotation schedule for vibration-intensive work
corrective_action: Replaced seat; implemented 4-hr max continuous operation with mandatory rotation

description: Excavator boom nearly struck surveyor who walked behind machine during grading
root_cause: Surveyor not trained on exclusion zones; no perimeter flagging in place
corrective_action: Added excavator awareness to surveyor orientation; installed perimeter flagging

description: Tree limb fell onto dozer cab during land clearing; no injury due to FOPS
root_cause: Dead tree not identified in pre-clear survey; limb broke during adjacent push
corrective_action: Implemented certified arborist survey for clearing operations; upgraded FOPS rating

description: Two haul trucks had minor collision at blind intersection; mirrors damaged
root_cause: Radio communication failure; no stop signs at intersection
corrective_action: Installed stop signs and mirrors at all haul road intersections; repaired radios

description: Excavator bucket descended toward worker in trench who was not visible on camera
root_cause: Camera was mud-covered; no trench spotter assigned
corrective_action: Added camera cleaning to pre-op; required dedicated trench spotter; installed audible alarm

description: Counterweight passed within 2 ft of concrete barrier with workers on other side
root_cause: Operator misjudged swing clearance; barrier was closer than usual due to lane shift
corrective_action: Recalculated swing clearances after every traffic shift; added proximity sensors

description: Technician's fall arrest lanyard caught him after slipping on icy mast platform
root_cause: Ice not cleared from platform before climbing; no pre-climb inspection
corrective_action: Required pre-climb surface inspection; added anti-slip coating to all mast platforms

description: Loader bucket caught edge of haul truck bed during loading causing truck to lurch sideways
root_cause: Operator fatigue during overtime shift; misjudged bucket position
corrective_action: Implemented mandatory fatigue management for overtime; added bucket-to-bed cameras

description: Excavator boom arced to overhead line during channel bank work; operator stayed in cab per training
root_cause: New temporary power line installed overnight without notifying excavation crew
corrective_action: Required 24-hr advance notice for any utility changes; daily utility verification walk

description: Dozer engine compartment fire caused by accumulated debris on exhaust; fire suppression activated
root_cause: Debris buildup from tunnel demolition; cleaning schedule not followed
corrective_action: Daily engine compartment blowdown required; weekly deep cleaning in demolition zones
